creator: jseger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I just upgraded the port to gmake 3.78.1 myself.  After doing so, I took 
a look at your patches.  They work, however they split the info files into 
many files instead of the one large file.  That's why we have patch-aa. 

Anyway, thanks for your submission.
